nl_prompt: I need a list of all items sold by store location in the last month of 2017.
prompt: I need a list of all items sold by store location in the last month of 2017.
sanitized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lte: ISODate('2017-12-31T23:59:59Z') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: '$storeLocation', items: { $push: { name: '$items.name', quantity: '$items.quantity' } } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, storeLocation: '$_id', items: 1 } }])

generated_prompt: Compare the average customer satisfaction for sales of 'backpacks' using coupons versus those without, from January to June 2017.
generated_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-01-01T00:00:00Z'), $lt: ISODate('2017-07-01T00:00:00Z') }, 'items.name': 'backpack' } }, { $group: { _id: '$couponUsed', averageSatisfaction: { $avg: '$customer.satisfaction' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, couponUsed: '$_id', averageSatisfaction: 1 } }])
